response.overview: Miss Universe Philippines 2020 was the first edition of the Miss Universe Philippines pageant under its new organization.[1] Previously, the Philippine franchise for Miss Universe was under Binibining Pilipinas Charities, Inc.[2] The coronation night was initially scheduled for May 3, 2020. However, due to the COVID-19 pandemic, it moved at least twice; first to June 14, 2020,[3] and later to October 25, 2020, at the Cordillera Convention Hall, Baguio Country Club in Baguio, Benguet.[4][5][6]
response.title: Miss Universe Philippines 2020
